headline: Devon And Coterra Merger Puts Permian Scale And Cash Returns In Focus
summary: Devon Energy (NYSE:DVN) has agreed to a material merger with Coterra Energy to form a large-cap oil and gas producer focused on the Permian Basin. The combined company is planned to pursue cost synergies, higher dividends, and a multibillion-dollar share buyback program. The transaction is expected to reshape Devon Energy's scale and capital return profile within the US energy sector. For you as an investor, this deal centers on Devon Energy's core business in US shale, with the Permian...
